items.name: Fry-Bone Skeleton Costume
items.description: Spook up your style with the Fry-Bone Skeleton Costume! This exclusive Halloween outfit from McDonald's turns you into a deliciously spooky skeleton with bones made of crispy fries. Perfect for trick-or-treating or haunting the Roblox world, this costume adds a tasty twist to the traditional skeleton look. Get ready to rattle some fry-bones and enjoy the Halloween season in Roblox with this limited-edition, flavor-packed outfit!
